channel.title: Assignments on MIT OpenCourseWare
channel.description: Recent content in Assignments on MIT OpenCourseWare

item.title: Assignments
item.description: Graded Assignments Your solutions to these graded questions must be submitted by the date specified below. Assignments 1-6 are to be completed individually. Assignments 7-9 involve case analysis and are to be done in half-groups. Optional Questions The optional questions are end-of-chapter problems that were chosen to provide particular reinforcement of the class topic. They are all from the course textbook, Pratt J., Financial Accounting in an Economic Context, 5th ed.
